select_when: Viability is threshold-dependent, so adoption, liquidity, trust, or participation only works after activity crosses a minimum density.
A few isolated wins will not compound unless they connect into a self-reinforcing system.
The real decision is whether momentum can become self-sustaining inside a defined area, network, or segment rather than whether the idea sounds attractive in general.
The plan needs a concrete answer to what density, scale, or seeding move is required before the system becomes durable.
avoid_when: Early launch energy or one-off seeding is being mistaken for durable threshold security before the reinforcement loop is actually stable.
Critical mass is being used as a handy threshold story even though the underlying structure does not really fit a threshold dynamic.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on density thresholds, self-sustaining momentum, and viability checks rather than broad innovation rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor-style marketplace expansion overlays because the raw source already provides stronger threshold and seeding logic.
Did not add higher-order fields because this batch keeps Wave 4 observational only.
open_questions: The typed fields compress a source that mixes marketplaces, organizational change, and network effects into one threshold-dynamics model.

select_when.note: The raw strengths and playbook sections explicitly describe threshold-dependent viability, local density, and self-sustaining momentum; review mainly compacts those ideas into routing triggers.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are directly supported by explicit warnings about mistaking early energy for durable mass and forcing the threshold frame onto weak fits.

input_type.note: The source activates on systems that need density before viability, but the compact input label is reviewed operational normalization.

output_type.note: The raw model produces threshold, seeding, and reachability checks; the output label compresses that into an operational artifact.

reasoning_types.note: Critical mass clearly operates through systems and causal threshold reasoning, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
